title: Rename devis - Restore Defaults returns to official device name
scenario: Restore Defaults on a renamed device does not revert device name to official name in Device Settings > General
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app with the Bluetooth audio device connected.
2. From the Home screen, tap the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings.
4. Tap the device's official name field.
6. Tap Done to save the custom name.
7. Navigate to the Restore tab (or Restore Defaults option) within Device Settings.
8. Tap Restore Defaults and confirm the action.
9. Check the device name displayed in the app.
expected: The device name reverts to its official name (e.g., 'Voyager' is shortened to 'V').
